title: Volunteer for Matt in your local area! | Matt Vickers
h1: Volunteer for Matt in your local area!
meta_description: In only 5 years, Stockton has seen unprecedented levels of investment, progress and success - and we need to spread the word of our achievements!
headings: h3: Matt Vickers MP for Stockton South
text_excerpt: Volunteer for Matt in your local area! | Matt Vickers Skip to main content Matt Vickers MP MP for Stockton West Main navigation Home About Matt Get in touch News In Parliament Getting Things Done Volunteer Matt Vickers MP MP for Stockton West Volunteer Volunteer for Matt in your local area! Tweet In only 5 years, Stockton has seen unprecedented levels of investment, progress and success - and we need to spread the word of our achievements! The Stockton West constituency covers the wards of Fairfield, Middleton St.George, Hurworth, Northern Parishes, Bishopsgarth, Elmtree, Thornaby (Village), Ingleby Barwick, Southern Villages, Hartburn, Yarm and Eaglescliffe. 👈 My team and I are always out delivering leaflets, attending campaign days and knocking on doors. Sign up using the form to the left if you can lend a hand! Thank you for your support so we can continue to transform our local area. Sign up to volunteer Leave this field blank First name Last name Email Mobile number Postcode Address ID Address Parliamentary constituency Admin county Admin district CED Admin ward Parish I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador Other… Enter other… The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
